# Contributing

See [docs/DEVELOPING.md](../docs/DEVELOPING.md) for the full contributor guide — setup, workflow, architecture overview, and PR process.

For code-touching specifics (threading model, queue message contract, install-method classification, module boundaries), the source of truth is [/CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) (also available as [/AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) — they're byte-identical).
